Title: Registration Form - Personal View
Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Select 'Personal' account type
3. Verify all form fields display
Expected Result:
- First Name field visible
- Last Name field visible
- Email field visible
- Password fields visible
- Terms checkbox present

Title: Create Account - Personal User
Steps:
1. Fill all required fields with valid data
2. Use unique email address
3. Set password meeting policy
4. Accept terms
5. Submit form
Expected Result:
- Account created successfully
- Confirmation displayed
- Can login with credentials

Title: Registration Form - Organization View
Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Select 'Organization' account type
3. Verify organization fields appear
Expected Result:
- Company Name field visible
- All personal fields visible
- Organization-specific options shown

Title: Create Account - Organization
Steps:
1. Select Organization type
2. Fill company name and details
3. Fill personal information
4. Submit form
Expected Result:
- Organization created
- User assigned as admin
- Organization visible in admin

Title: Password Visibility Toggle
Steps:
1. Enter password in password field
2. Click visibility toggle icon
3. Verify password becomes visible
4. Click toggle again
5. Verify password masked
Expected Result:
- Password toggles between masked/visible
- Works for both password fields

Title: Validation - Personal Required Fields
Steps:
1. Leave all fields empty
2. Click submit
3. Verify validation errors
4. Fill one field, submit
5. Verify remaining errors
Expected Result:
- Error shown for each empty required field
- Clear error messages
- Cannot submit until all filled

Title: Validation - Personal Max Characters
Steps:
1. Enter 256+ characters in First Name
2. Enter 256+ characters in Last Name
3. Enter very long email
4. Submit form
Expected Result:
- Max length enforced
- Appropriate error messages
- Form prevents overlong input

Title: Validation - Organization Required Fields
Steps:
1. Select Organization type
2. Leave all fields empty
3. Submit form
4. Verify all validation errors
Expected Result:
- Company name required error
- All personal field errors
- Clear messaging

Title: Validation - Unique Email
Steps:
1. Open registration form
2. Enter email of existing user
3. Fill other fields
4. Submit form
Expected Result:
- Error: Email already registered
- Suggests login or password reset

Title: Validation - Email Format
Steps:
1. Enter invalid email formats:
   - 'notanemail'
   - 'missing@domain'
   - '@nodomain.com'
2. Verify validation
Expected Result:
- Invalid format rejected
- Clear error message
- Valid format accepted

Title: Validation - Password Match
Steps:
1. Enter password in first field
2. Enter different password in confirm field
3. Submit form
Expected Result:
- Error: Passwords do not match
- Cannot submit until matching

Title: Validation - Password Policy
Steps:
1. Enter weak password: '123'
2. Verify rejection
3. Enter password without uppercase
4. Enter password without number
5. Enter valid complex password
Expected Result:
- Policy requirements enforced
- Clear feedback on requirements
- Strong password accepted

Title: Email Verification - Without
Steps:
1. Register new account
2. Verify no verification email required
3. Login immediately
Expected Result:
- Account active immediately
- No verification step
- Can login right away

Title: Email Verification - Optional
Steps:
1. Register new account
2. Verify option to verify or skip
3. Test both paths
Expected Result:
- Verification email sent
- Can skip verification
- Reminder shown if skipped

Title: Email Verification - Mandatory
Steps:
1. Register new account
2. Attempt login before verification
3. Verify email link
4. Login after verification
Expected Result:
- Cannot login before verification
- Verification link works
- Account active after verification

Title: Login - Empty Email
Steps:
1. Leave email field empty
2. Enter password
3. Click Sign In
Expected Result:
- Error: Email is required
- Cannot submit

Title: Login - Invalid User
Steps:
1. Enter non-existent email
2. Enter any password
3. Submit
Expected Result:
- Error: Invalid credentials
- No user information leaked

Title: Login - Invalid Password
Steps:
1. Enter valid email
2. Enter wrong password
3. Submit
Expected Result:
- Error: Invalid credentials
- Access failed count incremented

Title: Login - Email Verification Required
Steps:
1. Enter unverified user credentials
2. Submit login
Expected Result:
- Error: Email verification required
- Option to resend verification

Title: Login - Temporary Lockout
Steps:
1. Enter wrong password 5 times
2. Attempt login with correct password
3. Wait for lockout period
4. Retry login
Expected Result:
- Account temporarily locked after 5 failures
- Clear lockout message
- Can login after timeout

Title: Login - Admin Blocked User
Steps:
1. Attempt login with blocked user
2. Verify rejection
Expected Result:
- Error: Account is locked
- Contact admin message

Title: Login - Token Generation
Steps:
1. Login with valid credentials
2. Check /connect/token response
3. Verify token format
Expected Result:
- JWT token generated
- Token contains required claims
- Refresh token present

Title: Login - Token Persistence
Steps:
1. Note current token
2. Reload page
3. Verify still logged in
4. Check token refreshed
Expected Result:
- Session persists across reload
- Token automatically refreshed
- No re-login required

Title: Logout - Token Revocation
Steps:
1. Click Logout
2. Check /revoke/token call
3. Attempt to use old token
Expected Result:
- Logout completes
- Token revoked
- Old token rejected

Title: SSO - Entra ID Enabled
Steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Verify 'Sign in with Microsoft' button
3. Click SSO button
4. Complete Microsoft auth
5. Verify redirect back
Expected Result:
- SSO button visible
- Redirects to Microsoft
- User created/linked
- Logged in successfully

Title: SSO - Google Enabled
Steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Verify 'Sign in with Google' button
3. Click SSO button
4. Complete Google auth
5. Verify redirect back
Expected Result:
- SSO button visible
- Redirects to Google
- User created/linked
- Logged in successfully

Title: Login on Behalf - With Permission
Preconditions: Admin user with 'login on behalf' permission
Steps:
1. Login as admin
2. Navigate to user management
3. Select target user
4. Click 'Login on behalf'
5. Verify context switch
Expected Result:
- Admin can impersonate user
- User context active
- Can return to admin

Title: Login on Behalf - Org Maintainer
Steps:
1. Login as org maintainer
2. Navigate to organization members
3. Select employee
4. Login on behalf
Expected Result:
- Maintainer can impersonate employees
- Limited to own organization
